metadata.description: QuantumAgent marketplace — 4-scale quantum architecture for Claude Code

plugins.name: cosmos
plugins.description: 4-scale quantum architecture for AI-assisted development. v4.1 makes the claim 'every concept has direct operational meaning' verifiable — each of 26 quantum concepts now cites the exact file/skill/function where it's implemented, classified as real math (Path B) / enforced (system check) / detected (tooling) / guideline (documented rule). v4.0 ships the micro (code) scale: /cosmos scan detects code-tunnel, code-decoherence, code-superposition, code-jump.
